creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Thank you for this.

I have been waiting to update slurm to v18 until some upstream issues that affect some users are worked out.  I plan to update the port soon.  It seems that your patches are no longer necessary with version 18.  Could you confirm this and test if you have the time?

https://github.com/Jehops/freebsd-ports/tree/slurm18/sysutils/slurm-wlm
